song.title: Sanctuary
song.lyrics:
[V1] . D A 1) Lord, prepare me to be a sanctuary . G D A Pure and holy, tried and true . D A With thanksgiving, I want to be a living . G A D Sanctuary for You.
[V2] . G A D Bm 2) For thou Oh Lord art High above all the Earth, . G A D Thou are Exalted far above all gods [v3] . D 3) I Exalt Thee . A I Exalt Thee . G D A I Exalt Thee Oh Lord
[E] 1) Lord, prepare me to be a sanctuary Pure and holy, tried and true With thanksgiving, I want to be a living Sanctuary for You.
2) For thou Oh Lord art High above all the Earth, Thou are Exalted far above all gods
3) I Exalt Thee I Exalt Thee I Exalt Thee Oh Lord
